title: Ubiquiti Bullet AC IP67, Dual Band
description: The new dualband bullet in auliminium body as the successor to the airMAX series is a universal single-polarised radio unit with N-male connector that directly mounts on the antenna. In addition to the commonly used 5GHz band, the drive also supports the 2.4GHz band. In both cases, is compatible with other airMAX ac products only The unit has one Gbit Ethernet port that allows you to take advantage of all the 802.11ac capabilities. Powered by a 24V/0.5A DC POE Adapter , which, like the previous bullet, is not included The maximum bandwidth is 40MHz for the 2.4GHz band and 80MHz for the 5GHz band (for PtP mode), the compact radio boasts a modulation speed of 216Mbps in 2.4GHz and 433Mbps in 5GHz band. The device can only work in one band at a time Device Waterproof grommet N-male - N-female 90° coupler
